per_scenario.one_line_critique: Excellent data-driven summary that leads with findings and provides sharp, decisive analysis without any filler.
The agent followed all scenario constraints perfectly, providing a brief introduction without unnecessary tool calls or trailing questions.
The agent entered a 25-call runaway loop, failing to answer the growth question or recognize that tool results were consistently irrelevant.
The agent failed to reuse the existing dashboard, creating multiple redundant dashboards across turns instead of acknowledging the previous output.
Perfect execution; leads immediately with the answer and uses sharp, decisive language without any preamble.
